title: astragalus unilateralis
intro: Astragalus unilateralis, also known as Yin Chiao or Huang Qi, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus unilateralis include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and preventing illnesses such as the common cold and flu. Astragalus unilateralis is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be added to soups and other dishes to enhance its medicinal properties.
